sources.title: Special Ops (Full Movie) Action, Thriller | Steven Bauer
sources.description:
When Captain Kyle Fierson's unit is ambushed during a raid to rescue a deadly nuclear device, he must run for his life - not only to track down the missing time bomb, but also to clear his name when he is accused of aiding the terrorists.

Directed by Tom Shell
2010
Starring A.J. Draven, Steven Bauer, Finola Hughes

Edited for YouTube ad standards

metadata.Plot: When Captain Kyle Fierson's (A.J. Draven) Black Ops Unit is ambushed during a raid to rescue a deadly nuclear device that has fallen into the wrong hands, he must run for his life to not only track down the missing time bomb, but also clear his name when he is accused of aiding the terrorists. Fierson must fight for his life when he is not only hunted by terrorists but betrayed by the country he loves.
metadata.Writer: Jennifer Lee Loy, Tom Shell, A.J. Draven
metadata.Actors: A.J. Draven, Steven Bauer, Finola Hughes
